meaning: n.[植]耳状报春花,[动]耳螺属软体动物
examples: Meanwhile Rutongan tablets reduced the auricula swelling in mice(P<0.05) and foot-plate swelling in rats (P<0.01) .
The pheromone receptor of Auricularia auricula was similar to counterparts of tetrapolar basidiomycetes on the basis of BLAST results.
The results show the infrared spectrum of Auricularia auricula is mainly composed of the absorption of protein, aliphatic compound and polysaccharide.
